config.polytone.legacy_parsing.tooltip: Tries to translate formats from other mods to be parsed as Polytone files. Relevant for custom colors and colormaps.
config.polytone.lenient_loading.tooltip: Attempts loading packs with errors. Not guaranteed to work. Do NOT enable this if you are a pack creator.
config.polytone.particles_throttle.toolt: Scales down the amount of custom spawned particles. Decrease to artificially lowers their spawn chance. This is a last resort option to increase performance in unoptimized packs and should normally not be used.
message.polytone.fabulous_warning: Fabulous Graphics detected! Some polytone features may not work correctly with it enabled.
screen.polytone.configs.title: Polytone Packs Configs
